docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,168.34 FILED BY RUIZ, XOCE AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ROCK RESIDENTIAL CALIFORNIA, INC SF MULTIFAMILY IV PROPERTY OWNER LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY RUIZ, XOCE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF XOCE RUIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MISSION ROCK RESIDENTIAL CALIFORNIA, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MATTO FISCHER, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT SF MULIFAMILY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SF MULTIFAMILY IS DISMISSED BY PLAINTIFF ON APR-17-2026. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-23-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $76.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ROCK RESIDENTIAL CALIFORNIA, INC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIZ, XOCE AS TO DEFENDANT SF MULTIFAMILY IV PROPERTY OWNER LLC
SF MULTIFAMILY IV PROPERTY OWNER LLC IS NO LONGER DEFENDANT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MATTEO ORTIZ FISCHER, PROPERY MANGER FILED BY DEFENDANT MISSION ROCK RESIDENTIAL CALIFORNIA, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUIZ, XOCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MISSION ROCK RESIDENTIAL CALIFORNIA, INC THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT SF MULTIFAMILY WAS DISMISSED BY THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
